sections.paragraph:
ἐργασία, ας, ἡ [ἔργον]

—1. ‘engagement in act of production’, business, trade Ac 19:25; by extension to moral sphere Eph 4:19.

—2. ‘benefit derived from work’, gain, profit Ac 16:16, 19, 24.

—3. ‘expression of exertion’, effort δὸς ἐ. make the effort, take pains, get to work Lk 12:58.
